ingredients.text: designed for people with glutene intolerance

ingredients_text: designed for people with glutene intolerance, bread, pastries and pizza, system ca: corn starch, rice flour, vegetable ness (flea, bamboo), wholemeal rice flour 3,8%, lentil flour 3,6%, dextrose, thickening agents hydroxypropylmethyl cellulose, salt, may contain traces of soy, otis laktozi, consumption preferably before: see bottom, for lifenharma (7 a mmitd 003572205c200
ingredients_text_el: σχεδιασμένο για άτομα με δυσανεξία στη γλουτενη, παρασκευή ψωμιού, αρτοσκευασμάτων και πίτσας, ΣΥΣΤΑΤΙ ΚΑ: άμυλο καλαμποκιού, ρυζάλευρο, φυτικές νες (ψύλλιο, μπαμπού ), ρυζάλευρο ολικής 3,8%, αλεύρι φακής 3,6%, δεξτρόζη, πυκνωτικοί παράγοντες υδροξυπροπυλομεθυλοκυτταρίνη, αλάτι, Μπορεί να περιέχει ίχνη σόγιας, ΧΟΡΙΣ ΛΑΚΤΟΖΗ, Ανάλωση κατά προτίμηση πριν από: βλέπε κάτω μέρος, για Lifenharma (7 A MMItd 003572205c200
ingredients_text_en: designed for people with glutene intolerance, bread, pastries and pizza, system ca: corn starch, rice flour, vegetable ness (flea, bamboo), wholemeal rice flour 3,8%, lentil flour 3,6%, dextrose, thickening agents hydroxypropylmethyl cellulose, salt, may contain traces of soy, otis laktozi, consumption preferably before: see bottom, for lifenharma (7 a mmitd 003572205c200
ingredients_text_ro: Amidon de porumb, făină de orez, fibre vegetale (psyllium, bambus), făind integrală de orez 3,8%, făină de linte 3,6%, dextroză, agent de îngrosare: hidroxipropilmetil celuloză; sare. Poate conţine urme de soia. Nu conține: Gluten | Grau | Lactoză.
